library: בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים
description: Treatise in Judaeo-Arabic (Abraham Maimonides per FGP, but probably has no connection with him for the hand is 11th century). In fact an interesting theological treatise on the signs of prophecy that appears to come from the same manuscript as ENA 2709.64, ENA 3015.9-12, T-S Ar.46.53, T-S Ar.43.302, T-S Ar.48.267, and more. Some of these other fragments are identified with al-Qāḍī 'Abd al-Jabbār's Kitāb al-Mughnī fī Abwāb al-Tawḥīd wa-l-'Adl by Ayala Meyer Eliyahu on FGP. ASE and AA
description_he: טקסט ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
